levels.name: First Step
levels.hint: Move right once to reach the food.

levels.name: Straight Line
levels.hint: Keep walking to the right until you reach the end.

levels.name: Looking Back
levels.hint: This time the food is on your left.

levels.name: Long Walk Back
levels.hint: Cross the whole row by moving left.

levels.name: Short Climb
levels.hint: Moving up uses the same forward action.

levels.name: Long Drop
levels.hint: Now move downward until you reach the food.

levels.name: First Turn
levels.hint: Rotate before moving so you can go up.

levels.name: Simple Corner
levels.hint: Make one turn, then walk across the row.

levels.name: Gentle Curve
levels.hint: You need to change direction more than once.

levels.name: Open Square
levels.hint: Combine turns and movement to reach the corner.

levels.name: Short Detour
levels.hint: The center block forces you to go around.

levels.name: Upper Hallway
levels.hint: Look for an open path around the obstacles.

levels.name: Broken Column
levels.hint: The wall is incomplete; find the open side.

levels.name: Central Wall
levels.hint: Go above or below the wall to get through.

levels.name: Side Door
levels.hint: Not every obstacle lines up. Read the board carefully.

levels.name: Zigzag Path
levels.hint: Move, turn, and move again to avoid the walls.

levels.name: Closed Crossing
levels.hint: The direct route fails, so take the longer way around.

levels.name: Frozen Center
levels.hint: Think through the whole route before you start moving.

levels.name: First Jump
levels.hint: You cannot walk onto a hole, so jump across it.

levels.name: Long Gap
levels.hint: Use jump first, then keep moving to finish the route.

levels.name: Forced Jump
levels.hint: The side blocks force you to jump.

levels.name: Hole And Wall
levels.hint: Cross the gap first, then work your way around the wall.

levels.name: Narrow Pass
levels.hint: The hole opens the route, but the last block changes the order.

levels.name: Full Loop
levels.hint: Your first move is already a jump to the left.

levels.name: Broken Roof
levels.hint: Climb, jump, and then find the exit on the right side.

levels.name: Diagonal Jumps
levels.hint: Not every hole is a problem. Some of them shape the route.

levels.name: High Table
levels.hint: Jumping puts you in the right place to go around the wall.

levels.name: Split In Two
levels.hint: The center column and the holes divide the map into sections.

levels.name: Return With Gaps
levels.hint: Reach the opposite corner by mixing detours and jumps.

levels.name: Two Bites
levels.hint: Collect both foods along the same row.

levels.name: Corner To Corner
levels.hint: Plan the order so you can collect both foods cleanly.

levels.name: Broken Bridge
levels.hint: The first goal is after the jump. The second one is farther ahead.

levels.name: Double Climb
levels.hint: One food is above you, and the other is beyond the wall.

levels.name: U-Shaped Route
levels.hint: Going straight for both foods will not work. Change your plan.

levels.name: Out And Back
levels.hint: One goal is near the start; the other is across the board.

levels.name: Open Roof
levels.hint: Climb, collect, cross, and finish in the corner.

levels.name: Curve With Two Prizes
levels.hint: The jump helps, but you still have to go around a wall.

levels.name: Broken Mirror
levels.hint: Clear one half of the board before returning to the other side.

levels.name: Safety Line
levels.hint: Sometimes it is better to leave one food for the end.

levels.name: Double Stair
levels.hint: The two goals are on different heights, so plan the full route.

levels.name: First Break
levels.hint: The food is behind a breakable obstacle.

levels.name: Double Wood
levels.hint: Break more than once before you keep moving.

levels.name: Jump And Smash
levels.hint: Jump the gap first, then break the final obstacle.

levels.name: Paper Wall
levels.hint: Not every obstacle should be avoided. Some of them should be broken.

levels.name: Hammer Detour
levels.hint: The jump gets you closer, but the center is still closed.

levels.name: Splintered Crossing
levels.hint: There is a high route and a low route. Decide where each action belongs.

levels.name: Mixed Hallway
levels.hint: The key to this level is the relationship between the hole and the breakable block.

levels.name: Fractured Detour
levels.hint: One side of the board asks you to break, while the other asks you to jump.

levels.name: Double Finish
levels.hint: Set up your exit before taking the final food.

levels.name: Last Mid Level
levels.hint: Everything is in play now: jump, break, and collect.

levels.name: First Switch
levels.hint: Activate the switch to open the path of the matching group.

levels.name: Remote Gate
levels.hint: The switch is close, but the gate is farther away.

levels.name: Color And Jump
levels.hint: Open group 1 after crossing the gap.

levels.name: Switch On The Route
levels.hint: Do not ignore the switch. The second food depends on it.

levels.name: Southern Gate
levels.hint: The grouped gate is far from the switch, so order matters.

levels.name: Key Route
levels.hint: The switch opens a critical part of the path.

levels.name: Systems Crossing
levels.hint: Before you come back for the second food, clear the grouped gate.

levels.name: Activated Edge
levels.hint: One food is deep in the board, and the other is behind a grouped gate.

levels.name: Hard Closure
levels.hint: Use every tool, and do not activate the switch too late.

levels.name: Two Colors
levels.hint: Each switch opens its own gate. Use both groups.

levels.name: Crossed Gates
levels.hint: Open one color, move across the board, then open the other.

levels.name: Double Control
levels.hint: Both groups are now part of the main route.

levels.name: Twin Gate
levels.hint: Each food sits behind a different decision.

levels.name: Route Of Two Keys
levels.hint: It is not always best to open every gate right away.

levels.name: High Key Low Key
levels.hint: One switch is high and the other is low, so order matters.

levels.name: Long Circuit
levels.hint: The two gates form a long out-and-back circuit across the board.

levels.name: Double Detour
levels.hint: Each group helps on a different half of the board.

levels.name: Stepped Finale
levels.hint: Jump, break, and activate two groups before collecting everything.

levels.name: Paper Edge
levels.hint: The top edge helps, but only if both groups are active at the right time.

levels.name: Grand Finale
levels.hint: This final level mixes every system in the game into one route.
